mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dorm_bed WHERE bed_id = #{bedId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM dorm_bed WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bed_no ASC
SELECT * FROM dorm_bed WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND bed_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bed_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_bed (bed_no, room_id, bed_status, remark) VALUES (#{bedNo}, #{roomId}, #{bedStatus}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO dorm_bed (bed_no, room_id, bed_status, remark) VALUES
(#{bed.bedNo}, #{bed.roomId}, #{bed.bedStatus}, #{bed.remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dorm_bed WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND is_deleted = 0
